field_notes.scope: Remove method only; official write branch omits parameters and player list.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_player_team packet framing and dispatch/decode for one remove fixture only; does not infer team lifecycle, parameters, colors, visibility, collision, player memberships, or scoreboard UI behavior.
